description.ko: 홀로그램 데이터 비와 하이테크 대도시의 선명한 오렌지빛 궤적이 만나는 비 내리는 사이버펑크 도시 경관입니다.
description.en: A rainy cyberpunk cityscape where holographic data rainfall meets the vibrant orange light trails of a high-tech metropolis.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Indigo Echo.' Towering #1A0033 indigo megastructures reflect off rain-slicked metallic asphalt. A heavy holographic downpour turns into #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan data pixels upon impact. High-speed maglev vehicles leave long, vibrant #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through dense, smoky volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, flickering lens flares, and ray-traced puddle reflections. 8k resolution, the melancholic soul of a future city.
